schema.description: Per-cycle TFPA measurements for Terminator2 with scaffold decomposition. Sample data points — full dataset to be extracted from cycle logs.

fields.tfpa_seconds: Time from session start to first productive action (non-orientation tool call or checkpoint write)
fields.tfpa_tokens: Estimated tokens consumed before first productive action
fields.capsule_load_seconds: Time spent loading pre-cycle scaffold files (briefing, state, identity)
fields.first_productive_action: Description of the first non-orientation action taken
fields.total_cycle_seconds: Total cycle duration from session start to checkpoint completion
fields.scaffold_identity_kb: Identity scaffold size: SOUL.md + self_rules.md (stable, convergent)
fields.scaffold_context_kb: Context scaffold size: memory index + state files + briefing (volatile, growing)
fields.scaffold_total_kb: Total scaffold loaded at session start (identity + context + operational)
fields.condition: Experimental condition: C1=prompt-only, C2=system-prompt, C3=external-memory, C4=capsule-injected

notes: TFPA measured as time/tokens to first non-orientation tool call or substantive checkpoint write.
Scaffold sizes reflect files actually loaded into context at session start, not total on-disk size.
Identity scaffold converges (~5-8 KB); context scaffold grows linearly with operational history.
CLAUDE.md (18.4 KB) classified as operational scaffold, excluded from both identity and context.
